email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Junior Administrative Assistant bij Michael Page International. Uw oproep voor een gemotiveerde administratieve medewerker sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het beheren van content, het plannen van taken en het ondersteunen van verschillende afdelingen. Ik ben gewend om gestructureerd te werken, deadlines te halen en helder te communiceren. Mijn ervaring met Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint) is solide, en ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, met Nederlands op B1-niveau (in opleiding).

Ik ben leergierig, proactief en klaar om mijn carrière in administratie te starten. Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn organisatorische vaardigheden in te zetten voor uw team.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Junior Administrative Assistant position at Michael Page International. Your call for a motivated administrative assistant aligns perfectly with my profile.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for managing content, planning tasks, and supporting various departments. I am used to working in a structured way, meeting deadlines, and communicating clearly. My experience with Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint) is solid, and I speak fluent English and Turkish, with Dutch at B1 level (in training).

I am eager to learn, proactive, and ready to start my career in administration. I look forward to applying my organizational skills to your team.

I would be happy to discuss my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste lezer,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Junior Administrative Assistant bij Michael Page International. Uw oproep voor een gemotiveerde administratieve medewerker sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het beheren van content, het plannen van taken en het ondersteunen van verschillende afdelingen. Ik ben gewend om gestructureerd te werken, deadlines te halen en helder te communiceren. Mijn ervaring met Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint) is solide, en ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, met Nederlands op B1-niveau (in opleiding).

Hoewel mijn achtergrond in digitale marketing ligt, heb ik sterke organisatorische en administratieve vaardigheden ontwikkeld. Bij Episto beheer ik meerdere projecten tegelijk, van contentplanning tot rapportage. Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig te werken, maar ook om samen te werken met teams. Mijn technische ervaring met WordPress en SEO heeft mij geleerd om nauwkeurig en detailgericht te werken.

Ik ben leergierig, proactief en klaar om mijn carrière in administratie te starten. Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn organisatorische vaardigheden in te zetten voor uw team en te groeien binnen het bedrijf.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear reader,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Junior Administrative Assistant position at Michael Page International. Your call for a motivated administrative assistant aligns perfectly with my profile and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for managing content, planning tasks, and supporting various departments. I am used to working in a structured way, meeting deadlines, and communicating clearly. My experience with Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint) is solid, and I speak fluent English and Turkish, with Dutch at B1 level (in training).

Although my background is in digital marketing, I have developed strong organizational and administrative skills. At Episto, I manage multiple projects simultaneously, from content planning to reporting. I am used to working independently, but also to collaborating with teams. My technical experience with WordPress and SEO has taught me to work accurately and detail-oriented.

I am eager to learn, proactive, and ready to start my career in administration. I look forward to applying my organizational skills to your team and growing within the company.

I would be happy to discuss my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Proficient in Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
Organized and detail-oriented, with experience managing multiple projects and deadlines
Strong communication skills in English and Turkish, with Dutch at B1 level (in training)
Proactive and eager to learn, with a track record of taking initiative
Experience supporting departments with administrative tasks, content management, and scheduling
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Microsoft Office: Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint
- Administrative & organizational: scheduling, agenda management, correspondence, filing, data management
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
